activeFocus.summary: Stabilize cross-session memory continuity across Q xiaohu and Erliang using shared startup truth instead of local-only files.
Use the executable shared startup recovery command before any fresh-session guessing or local note hunting.

openLoops.summary: Verify that Erliang actually runs the shared startup recovery command in a fresh session and can restate the recovered active focus/open loops.

doNow: Run `node scripts/wakeup-memory-scan.mjs recover --brief` first in a fresh shared-memory session.
